message:
test: expand FRX pilot rollout harness, RGC CI quality gates, runtime
diagnostics CLI, GA evidence package, and phase-A exit gate test suites

FRX pilot rollout harness (frx_pilot_rollout_harness.rs):
- Add 225 lines covering the new rollout phase contract (shadow →
  canary → active), migration readiness inputs, blocked workload
  remediation queue, forced regression rollback drill, and phase-exit
  scorecard validation

RGC CI quality gates (rgc_ci_quality_gates.rs):
- Add 32 lines testing regression verdict ingestion with the new
  fail-closed error codes (0005/0006/0007) for missing, unconfigured,
  and blocking regression verdicts
- Update fixtures JSON with new gate definitions

Runtime diagnostics CLI (runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs):
- Add 280 lines covering GA evidence package assembly, mandatory field
  validation (fail-closed on missing release candidate, empty support
  bundle, missing scorecard signals), external artifact link parsing,
  risk disposition consolidation, and summary rendering

Phase-A exit gate contract (phase_a_exit_gate_contract.rs) [NEW]:
- New integration test verifying the phase-A exit gate script produces
  valid run manifests, events, and gate results

Other test fixes:
- causal_regret_evidence_gate_integration.rs: fix assertion structure
- franken_lockstep_runner_cli.rs: fix clippy lint
- frx_unit_test_taxonomy_contract.rs: fix clippy lint
- ga_release_delegate_guard.rs: remove unused import
- hook_effect_fallback_contract_integration.rs: fix test assertions
- one_lever_policy.rs: fix clippy lint
- reproducibility_contract.rs: fix clippy lint
- safe_mode_startup.rs: fix clippy lint
- security_e2e_integration.rs: fix clippy lint
- semantic_contract_baseline_enrichment_integration.rs: fix assertions
- slot_differential_gate_integration.rs: fix clippy lint
- succinct_witness_compiler_integration.rs: fix assertions
- capability_escrow_adversarial.rs: expand adversarial capability tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
